なるほど。<br>最近の司令官は、よくここで過ごしているんですね……: I see... Lately, Commander, you've been spending a lot of time here...
――いえいえ！<br>つまらないなんてとんでもないです！: No, no! It's not boring at all!
風の音を聞きながら、ゆっくりと日光浴！<br>とってもいい休日の過ごし方だと思い:
Listening to the wind while sunbathing slowly! I think it's a really nice
way to spend a holiday!
ポカポカ温かくて、わたしも癒されちゃってます。<br>いい休日の過ごし方を教えて:
It's nice and toasty warm, and I'm feeling healed too. Thank you for
showing me such a nice way to spend a holiday, Commander!♪
でも――司令官が隣にいると、その……ドキドキして……<br>温まるどころか、オー:
But—when Commander is next to me, well... my heart starts racing...
Instead of warming up, I feel like I'm about to overheat... ehehe...
